# GitHub Repo SEO Setup Checklist

Do these on github.com after pushing — they can't be set via files.

## 1. Repo Description (under name, indexed by Google)

Paste this exactly:
```
MCP server giving Claude Code, Cursor & Codex permanent AST code memory. 98.9% token reduction. 100% local.
```

## 2. Topics / Tags (appear in github.com topic searches)

Add all of these:
```
mcp
model-context-protocol
claude-code
cursor-ai
code-intelligence
ast
knowledge-graph
pagerank
ai-coding-assistant
codebase-memory
token-reduction
tree-sitter
semantic-search
llm-tools
developer-tools
python
```

## 3. Website / Homepage URL

```
https://ast-ra-mcp.vercel.app
```

## 4. Social Preview Image

Upload `docs/social-card.svg` as the repo social preview:
Settings → General → Social preview → Upload image

## 5. Releases

Create a v1.0.0 release with a descriptive changelog.
Each release = a new indexed page on GitHub with its own URL.
More pages = more keyword surface area for Google.

## 6. Repository Settings

- ✅ Issues enabled
- ✅ Discussions enabled (creates more indexed pages)
- ✅ Wiki disabled (consolidate docs in README/ARCHITECTURE)
- ✅ Sponsorships enabled if you want (adds credibility signal)
